name: Tyrael
description: A Tank who pairs well with allies that like to dive into the enemy team.<n/>
title: Archangel of Justice
info: Among the angels it is the Archangel of Justice Tyrael who is humanity's greatest defender. Wielding his sword El'druin against the Burning Hells, the Prime Evils would have enslaved humanity long ago if Tyrael had not intervened.

Tyrael.name: El'druin's Might
Tyrael.description: Throw El'druin to the target area, dealing 110 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by 30% for 2.5 seconds. It can be reactivated within 5 seconds to teleport Tyrael to El'druin and Slow nearby enemies again.

Tyrael.name: Righteousness
Tyrael.description: Shields Tyrael for 350 (+4% per level) damage and nearby allied Heroes and Minions for 40% as much for 4 seconds.

Tyrael.name: Smite
Tyrael.description: Rake target area, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage. For the next 3 seconds, allies moving through the targeted area gain 25% increased Movement Speed for 2 seconds.

Tyrael.name: Judgment
Tyrael.description: After 0.75 seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take 75 (+4% per level) damage.

Tyrael.name: Sanctification
Tyrael.description: After 0.5 seconds create a field of holy energy that makes allied Heroes Invulnerable. Lasts 3 seconds.

Tyrael.name: Archangel's Wrath
Tyrael.description: Upon dying, become Invulnerable and gain 20% Movement Speed for 4 seconds. Upon expiration, explode, dealing 450 (+4% per level) damage and reducing Tyrael's death timer by 10% per enemy Hero hit. Archangel's Wrath reduces nearby enemy Heroes' damage by  50% while active and for  3 seconds when it expires.

1.name: Salvation
1.description: Increase the Shield amount Tyrael gains from Righteousness by 35% and heal Tyrael for 150 (+4% per level) Health if his Shield is destroyed. Does not increase the Shield amount gained by allies.

1.name: Justice for All
1.description: Increase the Shield applied to allies by Righteousness to 80% of the Shield gained by Tyrael.

1.name: Ardent Restoration
1.description: Dealing damage to a Hero heals Tyrael for 20 (+4% per level) Health over 5 seconds. Dealing damage resets this timer, and the heal amount stacks up to 8 times.  Quest: Every Regeneration Globe gathered increases this heal amount by 1%.

4.name: Stalwart Angel
4.description: Gain 25 Armor while El'druin's Might is active, and for 3 seconds after teleporting.

4.name: Reciprocate
4.description: When Tyrael's Shield from Righteousness expires or is destroyed, it deals 170 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Heroes and Summons.  For each enemy Hero damaged by Reciprocate or El'Druin's Might, Tyrael heals for 3% of his maximum Health.

4.name: Divine Vigor
4.description: If Smite hits an enemy, Tyrael's Basic Attacks within the next 4 seconds heal for 70% of the damage dealt.

7.name: Burning Halo
7.description: Both Tyrael and El'druin deal 12 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Teleporting increases this damage from Tyrael by 125% for 2 seconds.

7.name: Purge Evil
7.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite increases Tyrael's Basic Attack damage by 60% for 4 seconds.

7.name: Swift Retribution
7.description: Smite grants 20% more Movement Speed and also grants 25% Attack Speed for 2 seconds.

10.name: Judgment
10.description: After 0.75 seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take 75 (+4% per level) damage.

10.name: Sanctification
10.description: After 0.5 seconds create a field of holy energy that makes allied Heroes Invulnerable. Lasts 3 seconds.

13.name: Sword of Justice
13.description: Upon teleporting using El'druin's Might, El'druin swaps places with Tyrael, and El'druin's Might can be reactivated to teleport an additional time.

13.name: Holy Ground
13.description: Create a ring for 3 seconds that blocks enemies from entering the area teleported to using El'druin's Might.

13.name: Law and Order
13.description: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite reduces the cooldown of Righteousness by 1 second. Each allied Hero Shielded by Righteousness increases the damage of the next Smite by 35%.

16.name: Bound by Law
16.description: El'Druin's Might's Slow is increased to 65% for 1 second, decaying to 30% over the remaining duration.

16.name: Horadric Reforging
16.description: Tyrael's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of El'druin's Might by 2 seconds.

16.name: Smite the Wicked
16.description: While El'druin's Might is active, and for 2 seconds after teleporting, Smite's cooldown recharges 125% faster.

20.name: Angel of Justice
20.description: Increases the cast range of Judgment by 50%, and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.

20.name: Holy Arena
20.description: Increase the duration of Sanctification by 1 second and increase the damage of allies inside by 25%.

20.name: Seal of El'druin
20.description: Using a Basic Ability grants 50% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.

20.name: Defense of the Angels
20.description: Activate to gain 50 Armor for 3 seconds.  Each time Tyrael damages an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack or Basic Ability, increase the duration of this Armor bonus by 0.5 seconds.

20.name: Aspect of Justice
20.description: After 1.25 seconds, gain the effects of Archangel's Wrath without dying. Cooldown is reduced by 15% for each enemy Hero hit by the explosion.

tooltipMarkup.TyraelArchangelsWrath: Upon dying, become Invulnerable and gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelArchangelsWrathDeathActiveBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor *100"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelArchangelsWrathDeathActiveBuff,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Upon expiration, explode, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ArchangelsWrathDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and reducing Tyrael's death timer by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> per enemy Hero hit.<n/><n>Archangel's Wrath reduces nearby enemy Heroes' damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Behavior,TyraelArchangelsWrathDebuffEnemyBehaviorDuring,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic] *100"/>%</c> while active and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelArchangelsWrathDebuffEnemyBehaviorAfter,Duration"/></c> seconds when it expires.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelArdentRestoration: Dealing damage to a Hero heals Tyrael for Health over seconds. Dealing damage resets this timer, and the heal amount stacks up to times.Quest: Every Regeneration Globe gathered increases this heal amount by %.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelAspectofJusticeTalent: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,TyraelAspectofJustice,CastIntroTime" precision="2"/></c> seconds, gain the effects of Archangel's Wrath without dying. Cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TyraelAspectofJusticeReduceCooldown,Cost[0].Fraction.Cooldown*100"/>%</c> for each enemy Hero hit by the explosion.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelBurningHalo: Both Tyrael and El'druin deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TyraelBurningHaloDamage,Amount"/></c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Teleporting increases this damage from Tyrael by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TyraelBurningHaloDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BurningHalo].Modifier*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelEldruinsMightBurningHaloBonusDamageCarryBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelDefenseOfTheAngels: Activate to gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelDefenseOfTheAngels,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelDefenseOfTheAngels,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Each time Tyrael damages an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack or Basic Ability, increase the duration of this Armor bonus by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TyraelDefenseoftheAngelsModifyDuration,Value"precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelDivineVigor: If Smite hits an enemy, Tyrael's Basic Attacks within the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelSmiteDivineVigorTalentProcBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,TyraelSmiteDivineVigorTalentProcBuff,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Basic]"/>%</c> of the damage dealt.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelElDruinsMight: Throw El'druin to the target area, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,ElDruinsMightDamage,Amount + (Effect,ElDruinsMightDamage,Amount * Effect,ElDruinsMightDamage,AttributeFactor[Structure])"/></c> damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100* Behavior,ElDruinsMightSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ElDruinsMightSlow,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds. It can be reactivated within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ElDruinsMightSwordTimedLife,Duration"/></c> seconds to teleport Tyrael to El'druin and Slow nearby enemies again.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelElDruinsMightBoundByLawTalent: El'Druin's Might's Slow is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*(Behavior,ElDruinsMightSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor+Talent,TyraelElDruinsMightBoundByLaw,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)" player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d const="$TyraelElDruinsMightBoundByLawSlowDuration"/></c> second, decaying to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-(100*Behavior,ElDruinsMightSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor)" player="0"/>%</c> over the remaining duration.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelElDruinsMightHolyGroundTalent: Create a ring for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,ElDruinsMightMasteryPathingBlockerTimedLife,Duration"/></c> seconds that blocks enemies from entering the area teleported to using El'druin's Might.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelElDruinsMightHoradricReforgingTale: Tyrael's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of El'druin's Might by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TyraelHeroWeaponHoradricReforgingTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelElDruinsMightSwordOfJusticeTalent: Upon teleporting using El'druin's Might, El'druin swaps places with Tyrael, and El'druin's Might can be reactivated to teleport an additional time.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelJudgment: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,TyraelJudgement,CastIntroTime[0]" precision="2"/></c> seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,JudgementDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,JudgementStun,Duration[0]" precision="1"/></c> seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,JudgementAOEDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelJudgmentAngelOfJusticeTalent: Increases the cast range of Judgment by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,TyraelMasteryJudgmentAngelofJustice,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,TyraelJudgement,Range"player="0"precision="0"/>%</c>, and reduces the cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,TyraelMasteryJudgmentAngelofJustice,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value * (-1)"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelJusticeForAll: Increase the Shield applied to allies by Righteousness to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Behavior,TyraelRighteousnessJusticeForAllAllyShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit/Behavior,TyraelRighteousnessShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit)*100"/>%</c> of the Shield gained by Tyrael.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelRighteousness: Shields Tyrael for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelRighteousnessShield,DamageResponse[0].ModifyLimit[0]"/></c> damage and nearby allied Heroes and Minions for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> as much for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelRighteousnessShield,Duration[0]"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelRighteousnessLawAndOrderTalent: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite reduces the cooldown of Righteousness by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,TyraelSmiteLawAndOrderTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> second. Each allied Hero Shielded by Righteousness increases the damage of the next Smite by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,TyraelLawAndOrderSmiteDamageAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelRighteousnessReciprocateTalent: When Tyrael's Shield from Righteousness expires or is destroyed, it deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RighteousnessExpirationDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby Heroes and Summons.<n/><n/>For each enemy Hero damaged by Reciprocate or El'Druin's Might, Tyrael heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TyraelElDruinsMightBoundByLawCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*100"/>%</c> of his maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelSalvation: Increase the Shield amount Tyrael gains from Righteousness by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,TyraelRighteousnessSalvationAddition,Offset/Behavior,TyraelRighteousnessShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit*100"/>%</c> and heal Tyrael for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RighteousnessSalvationCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health if his Shield is destroyed. Does not increase the Shield amount gained by allies.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelSanctificationHolyArenaTalent: Increase the duration of Sanctification by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,TyraelMasterySanctificationHolyArena,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> second and increase the damage of allies inside by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelSanctificationHolyArenaDamageBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelSanctificationStationary: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,TyraelSanctificationStationary,CastIntroTime[0]" precision="1"/></c> seconds create a field of holy energy that makes allied Heroes Invulnerable. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TyraelSanctificationStationaryPersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,TyraelSanctificationStationaryPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelSealofElDruin: Using a Basic Ability grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,TyraelSealOfElDruin,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelSealOfElDruin,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelSmite: Rake target area, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,TyraelSmiteDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. For the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d const="$TyraelSmiteConcecratedGroundDuration"/></c> seconds, allies moving through the targeted area gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,TyraelSmiteConcecratedGroundTarget,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c> increased Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelSmiteConcecratedGroundTarget,Duration[0]" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelSmitePurgeEvilTalent: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite increases Tyrael's Basic Attack damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,TyraelSmitePurgeEvilProcBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelSmitePurgeEvilProcBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelSmiteSwiftRetributionTalent: Smite grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Talent,TyraelMasterySwiftRetribution,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)"player="0"/>%</c> more Movement Speed and also grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelSmiteSwiftRetributionAttackSpeed,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelSmiteSwiftRetributionAttackSpeed,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelSmiteTheWicked: While El'druin's Might is active, and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelEldruinsMightSmiteTheWickedEldruinsFlashCarryBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds after teleporting, Smite's cooldown recharges <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(-Effect,TyraelSmiteSmiteTheWickedTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/Behavior,TyraelSmiteSmiteTheWickedTalentCarry,Period)"/>%</c> faster.
tooltipMarkup.TyraelStalwartAngel: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelElDruinsMightStalwartAngelTalentSwordActiveBuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor while El'druin's Might is active, and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TyraelElDruinsMightStalwartAngelTalentTeleportBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds after teleporting.
